lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear and is in exceptional mechanical and cosmetic state. All components are in perfect working order.

Looking for a dependable vehicle that’s ready for the road? This car is in fair condition and offers great value! While it shows some expected signs of wear from its previous journeys, it remains a reliable performer that’s perfect for someone seeking a practical and functional ride at an affordable price.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained. Mechanically, it is sound; the engine is strong and the transmission shifts smoothly, providing a reliable driving experience. The interior is clean and well-preserved, showing only minor signs of wear. The exterior paint retains a good shine, although there are a few small cosmetic blemishes typical for its age. All major systems are functioning correctly, and it comes with a documented service history, making it a solid choice for its next owner.

The car is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows signs of regular use and wear. The mechanical systems are operational but will require maintenance soon.

This vehicle is in solid, good condition and has been consistently well-maintained throughout its life. The engine starts reliably and runs smoothly, while the transmission shifts accurately through all gears. On the exterior, the paint still carries a nice shine, though you may find a few minor surface scratches and small rock chips consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is clean with only light wear on the seat bolsters and carpets. All electronics and climate control systems are fully functional. It has a complete service history, making it a dependable choice for anyone looking for a well-cared-for pre-owned vehicle.
Poor condition.

We are proud to present this extraordinary vehicle, maintained in impeccable condition and exhibiting the highest standards of automotive preservation. This specimen remains indistinguishable from its original showroom state, featuring flawless aesthetics and a meticulously documented history of care. Designed for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a benchmark example of its class.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied it since day one, keeping it spotless and perfectly maintained. If you're looking for something that’s basically brand new, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 is a peerless example of the legendary S54-powered platform, featuring a high-revving 3.2L straight-six with individual throttle bodies and a fully overhauled high-pressure VANOS system for optimized valve timing. The chassis exhibits exceptional torsional rigidity, benefiting from proactive rear subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension featuring Bilstein dampers and polyurethane bushings to maintain precise toe and camber alignment. Power is delivered through a tactile 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock, ensuring maximum traction during lateral acceleration. Every mechanical system, including the rod bearings and the entire cooling circuit, has been meticulously maintained to exceed factory tolerances. Finished in a concours-level Carbon Black over Nappa leather, this vehicle represents a turnkey opportunity for the purist seeking a machine with flawless mechanical synchroneity and uncompromised performance metrics.
Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Interior like new. Mechanically perfect. Clean title in hand.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous care and pride of ownership. This car remains in showroom condition, having been stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage and hand-washed to preserve its mirror-like finish. The exterior paint is flawless, devoid of any swirls, stone chips, or imperfections, while the alloy wheels are pristine without a hint of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather seats are supple and show no signs of wear, and the original carpets have been protected since day one. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist features, operates with factory precision. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a full-service history with every scheduled maintenance performed ahead of time. The engine bay is spotless, and the drive is as smooth and quiet as the day it was first delivered. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives like it just rolled off the assembly line.

Presented in showroom condition, this vehicle stands as a definitive example of automotive excellence. Meticulously preserved and free from any discernible wear, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the most discerning professional. This is a rare opportunity to acquire an investment-grade motorcar that has been maintained to an exacting standard.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance and long-term reliability. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine specimen.

Hey there! 👋 You seriously have to see this absolute beauty! It's in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've babied this car since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for that 'brand new' vibe without the brand new price, this is your lucky day! Come grab this gem before someone else does! ✨

Mint condition. Original paint. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional specimen that redefines the standard for 'mint' condition. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, preserving its showroom-quality finish. The exterior boasts a deep, glass-like luster with zero imperfections, protected by a premium ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine, factory-fresh state, with the scent of premium leather still lingering and not a single crease on the bolsters. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships, with a complete paper trail included. Mechanically, it operates with the precision of a new car—tight suspension, smooth shifts, and a responsive engine. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting meticulous ownership. A rare find for the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking uncompromising quality.

Presented in exemplary condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of care synonymous with showroom quality. Mechanically sound and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, this offering is tailored for the discerning collector who demands absolute excellence.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. It is in truly pristine condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled right off the showroom floor! I've taken incredible care of it, and it's been kept spotless inside and out. If you're looking for a ride that’s practically brand new and ready for some adventures, this is the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Mint condition. Flawless exterior and interior. No mechanical issues. Low mileage. Single owner.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defies its age, maintained to the highest possible standards. This car is in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely zero imperfections—no rock chips, door dings, or swirl marks. It has been meticulously garage-kept and protected from the elements since day one. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather is supple and free of wear, the carpets are spotless, and it retains that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component and driver-assist feature functions perfectly. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history from authorized dealerships. The engine runs with whisper-quiet precision, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the undercarriage is as clean as the bodywork. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a turn-key, collector-quality vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did when it first left the showroom floor.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in impeccable condition. We invite serious inquiries to experience this peerless example of engineering and luxury.
